title: microsorum australiense
intro: Microsorum australiense, also known as Austral Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum australiense include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as acting as a natural antacid to soothe stomach ulcers. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application to utilize its medicinal properties.
